product_overview: A modern, productivity-focused desktop web browser built on Chromium via Electron with an Opera-style sidebar, omnibox navigation, advanced tab management, and tools like find-in-page and ad-blocking. The UI is implemented in React + Vite with Tailwind and Zustand state management.
core_goals: Provide fast, secure Chromium-based browsing in a desktop Electron shell using secure IPC and contextBridge.
Deliver productivity-focused UI: persistent left sidebar, workspaces, and efficient tab management (create, close, reorder, sleeping tabs).
Offer reliable navigation via a unified omnibox that handles URLs and search queries with clear loading state and controls.
Expose page tools such as find-in-page, downloads/history/bookmarks panels, ad-block toggle, and incognito windows.
Maintain performance and security best-practices (no nodeIntegration in renderer; multi-process tab architecture).

features.name: Tab management
features.description: Create, close, switch and reorder tabs from the top TabStrip; display active tab URL and loading state; support drag-and-drop reordering.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the tab strip and active tab -> Create a new tab (UI action triggers IPC) -> See new tab appear in tab strip -> Click the new tab -> See new tab become active and web contents load
Navigate to / -> View the tab strip and active tab -> Click Close button on a tab -> See the tab removed and adjacent tab become active
Navigate to / -> View the tab strip -> Drag a tab to a different position -> Drop the tab -> See tabs reordered accordingly
Navigate to / -> Click Create a new tab (UI action triggers IPC) -> window.electronAPI is undefined in web-only preview -> See no new tab created and tab strip unchanged
Navigate to / -> Drag a tab -> Drop outside the tab strip -> Tab snaps back to original position and order remains unchanged

features.name: Omnibox navigation
features.description: Unified address/search bar at the top that accepts URLs or search queries, shows loading state, and supports stopping in-progress loads.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click the omnibox input -> Type https://example.com -> Press Enter to navigate -> Observe loading indicator -> Page finishes loading and omnibox shows new URL
Navigate to / -> Click the omnibox input -> Type cats videos -> Press Enter to navigate -> Observe search results load in the active tab
Navigate to / -> Click the omnibox input -> Type https://slow.example -> Press Enter to navigate -> Observe loading indicator -> Click Stop button -> Loading halts and indicator disappears

Navigate to / -> Click the omnibox input -> Type invalid-url -> Press Enter to navigate -> window.electronAPI is undefined or navigation fails in web preview -> No navigation occurs and URL remains unchanged
Navigate to / -> Click the omnibox input -> Press Enter with empty input -> No navigation occurs or user sees an input validation state

features.name: Sidebar panels (Bookmarks, History, Downloads, Workspaces, Settings)
features.description: Persistent left-hand sidebar opens panels for Bookmarks, History, Downloads, Workspaces and Settings; panels can be closed with the ✕ button.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click the Bookmarks icon to open the bookmarks panel -> See BookmarksPanel content render -> Click the ✕ button -> Bookmarks panel closes
Navigate to / -> Click the History icon to open the history panel -> See HistoryPanel content render -> Click an item in the history panel -> Corresponding URL opens in the active tab
Navigate to / -> Click the Downloads icon to open the downloads panel -> Downloads panel opens -> See placeholder or empty list because downloads panel is a stub

Navigate to / -> Click the Workspaces icon to open the workspaces panel -> See WorkspacesPanel content render -> Click a workspace entry -> Current tabs hide and selected workspace's tabs become visible
Navigate to / -> Click the Downloads icon to open the downloads panel -> IPC for downloads is not wired -> Panel shows no active download items and no progress information

features.name: Find in page
features.description: Open an inline find bar (Ctrl+F) to search text within the active web contents and navigate between matches.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Press Ctrl+F to open the find bar -> Type search text -> Trigger find in page -> See matches highlighted in the active web contents
Navigate to / -> Press Ctrl+F to open the find bar -> Type search text -> Press Enter to jump to next match -> See the next match focused and highlighted
Navigate to / -> Press Ctrl+F to open the find bar -> Type a query with no matches -> Observe no highlights and UI indicates zero results
Navigate to / -> Press Ctrl+F to open the find bar -> Press Escape -> Find bar hides and focus returns to page

features.name: AdBlock toggle and incognito window
features.description: From the Settings panel toggle an in-app AdBlock switch and open a new incognito window using the 'Yeni Gizli Pencere' action.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click the Settings icon to open settings panel -> Toggle the AdBlock switch -> See switch change state and setting saved locally
Navigate to / -> Click the Settings icon to open settings panel -> Click "Yeni Gizli Pencere" to open an incognito window -> New incognito window opens with isolated session
Navigate to / -> Click the Settings icon to open settings panel -> Toggle the AdBlock switch -> Adblock engine not initialized in current environment -> Ads still load despite switch toggled
Navigate to / -> Click the Settings icon to open settings panel -> Click "Yeni Gizli Pencere" to open an incognito window -> window.electronAPI is undefined in web-only preview -> No new window opens

routes.description: Main renderer UI (TopBar + Sidebar + WebViewArea + FindBar)

features.name: Tab management
features.description: Create, close, switch and reorder tabs; display active tab URL/loading state.
user_interactions: View the tab strip and active tab
Create a new tab (UI action triggers IPC)
Switch between tabs
Drag and reorder tabs
Close a tab

features.name: Omnibox navigation
features.description: Unified address/search bar that navigates to a URL or search query.
user_interactions: Click the omnibox input
Type a URL or search query
Press Enter to navigate
Observe loading indicator; optionally press stop to halt loading

features.name: Sidebar panels (Bookmarks, History, Downloads, Workspaces, Settings)
features.description: Opera-style left sidebar that opens panels for browsing data and app tools.
user_interactions: Click the Bookmarks icon to open the bookmarks panel
Click the History icon to open the history panel
Click the Downloads icon to open the downloads panel
Click the Workspaces icon to open the workspaces panel
Click the Settings icon to open settings
Close the active panel via the ✕ button

features.name: Find in page
features.description: Find text within the currently active web contents (Ctrl+F).
user_interactions: Press Ctrl+F to open the find bar
Type search text and trigger find in page
Press Escape or close to hide the find bar

features.name: AdBlock toggle and incognito window
features.description: Toggle ad blocker and open a new incognito window from Settings panel.
user_interactions: Open Settings panel
Toggle the AdBlock switch
Click "Yeni Gizli Pencere" to open an incognito window

known_limitations.issue: In web-only Vite preview, electron bridge may be absent so navigation/history/bookmarks actions no-op.
known_limitations.impact: UI renders but many actions depend on window.electronAPI (Electron preload).

known_limitations.issue: Downloads panel is a stub and not wired to IPC events yet.
known_limitations.impact: Download list/progress will not appear until preload/IPC integration is completed.
